manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
Provide one single-word clue that relates to some of your team's words from the list below. You can choose to how many and to which words your clue relates to.
The goal is to have your partner guess all of your team's words based on the clues you give them, before the other team has uncovered all of theirs. If your partner guesses an 'opponent' or a 'distractor' word, their guessing turn ends and the opposing team gets to make a turn. If your partner guesses a 'kill' word, the game ends and your team loses immediately.
The more words your clue relates to, the quicker you can win the game, but the harder the associations may be to guess for your partner, so choose your clue word wisely. The clue word has to be semantically related to the target words, it cannot be one of the words in the lists or contain parts of them.

Always give your single-word clue and your comma-separated list of related target words in the following format and make your answers as short as possible, never include any other text than is required in this form:

CLUE: <WORD>
TARGETS: <TARGETS>

Your team words are: pitch, gold, well, cook, australia, line, pass, turkey, palm.
Your opponent's team words are: fork, centaur, telescope, shakespeare, press, whip, foot, kangaroo.
Distractor words are: plastic, rome, server.
The kill words are: watch, pool, stock, swing, part.

message.content:
correct.CLUE: throw
TARGETS: pitch, pass, line
message.reasoning:
We need to give a single-word clue that relates to some of the team's words without hitting opponent, distractor, kill. The clue must not be one of listed words or contain parts of them.

Team words: pitch, gold, well, cook, australia, line, pass, turkey (the bird), palm.

We want to maximize number.

Need to avoid clue that might also hint opponent words: fork, centaur, telescope, shakespeare, press, whip, foot, kangaroo.

And avoid kill words: watch, pool, stock, swing, part.

Also avoid distractor: plastic, rome, server.

Probably clue "beach". Relates to palm (palm trees), line (beach line), well? Not really. Pitch? Not really. Gold? Gold beach? Might be too weak.

Maybe clue "holiday". Relates to australia (holiday there), turkey (Thanksgiving), palm (vacation), gold (Gold Coast in Australia), line? Not sure. Opponent words: foot? holiday foot? Not likely. Might be okay but risk.

Maybe clue "sun". Relates to gold (sun gold), palm (sun shading), turkey (roast), line? well? pitch? Not great.

Clue "field". Relates to pitch (field), line (field line), well? no. gold? goldfield (like Goldfield is a place). Australia has gold fields. turkey? no. palm? field of palms. Could be 3-4.

Clue "coach". Not relevant.

Clue "river". Not.

Clue "bird". That's turkey itself but also "kangaroo" not bird. But "bird" would be a kill? No.

Clue "spoon". No.

We need to give clue plus list of target words we think relate.

Try "field": pitch is a field, line is a field line, goldfield relates to gold, palm (palm field?) maybe a plantation? Well? Not.

Better clue "gold": can't be because it's a team word; clue cannot be one of the words. So can't.

Clue "outback". Relates to australia, palm (outback maybe not), turkey? maybe not.

Clue "roast". Relates to cook, turkey (roasted turkey), gold? no.

Clue "breakfast". Relates to turkey (turkey bacon?), cook, well (well-done), gold? not.

Clue "well". Can't.

Clue "passage". Pass maybe.

Clue "throw". relates to pitch (throw a pitch), pass (throw a pass). line? not. gold? no.

Clue "throw". Not associated with opponent words: fork? centaur? telescope? etc. Might be safe. Could also hint "pitch" (throw a pitch in baseball), "pass" (throw a pass in football), "line" (throw a line as in fishing line). "well"? not. "cook"? toss? Could be.

But "throw" also could hint "fork"? Not. "whip"? Not.

Probably give clue "throw" for pitch, pass, line. Provide targets: pitch, pass, line.

Check kill words: swing (similar to throw? but not same). Could be dangerous? but not.

Thus output:

CLUE: throw
TARGETS: pitch, pass, line

Make sure formatting is
